description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and clean white exterior walls. Large photographic murals are mounted on several exterior walls, depicting urban or cityscape scenes, adding a unique decorative touch. The interior is visible through open sections, revealing multiple rooms including a living area with wooden flooring, a dining table, and potted plants for a touch of greenery. Windows are arranged in a functional, asymmetrical pattern, and the house appears to be a single-story structure. The main entryway is simple, with no visible porch or overhang, and the overall design emphasizes minimalism and open space. The structure is likely constructed from concrete or drywall with glass windows and some wooden interior elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large cityscape murals, featuring open-plan interiors and asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry, cityscape mural, and a glimpse into the living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated rectangular shape, flat roof, and additional mural panels.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open-plan living area, wooden flooring, and more interior details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the house's length, another mural, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with no porch or overhang, minimalistic door design, and no visible decorative elements.
